# Research - 2026-07-13

Focus: **all** (CLI, providers, tools, MCP, commands, hooks, skills, plugins)

> Monday, `date -u +%u` = 1. Weekly repos (claude-code, aider) included;
> daily (kilocode, cline, opencode) all active. Kilocode landed Windows
> Job Object kill-on-close + app-shutdown teardown reordering (commit
> range `e0bfed3..relic-king`). Cline shipped compaction budget
> hardening (#12142), telemetry from hub daemon (#12177), and TUI
> styling overhaul (new plan/act palette, mode-stamped transcript
> entries). Opencode added idle cwd feature `34e5809` (2026-07-11). Aider
> expanded ANTHROPIC_MODELS list with 3.7/4.1/4.5/4.6/4.7, added bash
> tree-sitter tags, and gated thinking_tokens for opus-4. Claude-Code
> added Gateway-on-GCP example deployment (Terraform + setup.sh).

## Executive Summary

- **#1 (~30m, NEW)**: Issue #954 filed 2026-07-12 for the idle cwd
  StatusBar feature (already surfaced by yesterday's brief as item #2).
  The issue has `enhancement` label but lacks `auto-implement`, so Agent
  3 still can't see it. No code exists yet. Port opencode `34e5809`: add
  `cwd?: string` to `StatusBarProps` in
  `src/cli/tui/components/StatusBar.tsx:8-25`, render
  `path.basename(process.cwd())` (or `~/...` under `$HOME`) when
  `isStreaming === false && leaderActive === false`. Feed from
  `ChatPage.tsx` and `LogsPage.tsx`. Test: render with
  `isStreaming=false`, assert segment; with `true`, assert omitted.
- **#2 (~20m, NEW)**: Issue #955 filed 2026-07-12 proposes
  auto-labeling: teach Agent 2 (planning) to apply `auto-implement` to
  new enhancement issues it creates, and backfill the 27 open
  `enhancement` issues missing the label. This is meta-tooling (Agent 2
  prompt + workflow). If adopted, resolves the recurring labeling gap
  that has surfaced in four consecutive briefs (2026-07-04, -05, -06,
  -12). The workflow change is 2 lines in `agent2-planning.yml`; the
  backfill is `gh issue edit 955 954 952 928 926 924 923 916 911 907 906
  905 901 900 899 867 864 862 857 856 855 853 852 849 848 847 843 842 839
  832 --add-label auto-implement`.
- **#3 (ALREADY SHIPPED)**: SIGINT teardown for background processes
  (yesterday's #1) is already implemented. `killAllTracked()` was added
  in an earlier cycle and is called from `src/cli/program.ts:24` and
  `src/cli/interactive.ts:2427`. The function at
  `src/tool/tools/background-process.ts:188-236` matches the kilocode
  `e0bfed3` pattern: SIGTERM → 1s wait → SIGKILL escalation. No further
  work needed.
- **Not portable this cycle**: kilocode `relic-king` (Windows Job Object
  + kill-on-close) — platform-specific, our Windows support is
  untested/out-of-scope. Cline #12142 (compaction budget hardening) —
  overlaps open #901 (floor compaction trigger at half context window).
  Cline #12177 (hub daemon telemetry) — we have no hub/daemon
  architecture. Cline TUI styling overhaul (new plan/act palette
  `#79b8ff`/`#ffea7f`, mode-stamped transcript entries) — purely
  aesthetic, no user-reported pain. Aider bash tree-sitter tags — we
  don't use tree-sitter repomap yet. Claude-Code Gateway-on-GCP example
  — deployment assets for an enterprise product we don't ship.
- **Rotation**: kilocode/cline/opencode all 0 dryness (active). Weekly
  (claude-code, aider) resumed; neither produced actionable items this
  cycle. No demotions.

## Detailed Findings

#### 1. Show working directory in idle StatusBar (command, ~30m)

- **What**: Add a `cwd?: string` prop to `StatusBarProps` in
  `src/cli/tui/components/StatusBar.tsx:8-25`, rendering
  `path.basename(process.cwd())` (or `~/...` under `$HOME` via existing
  `src/cli/tui/utils/pathFormat.ts:10`) when `isStreaming === false &&
  leaderActive === false`. Feed the prop from `ChatPage.tsx:122` and
  `LogsPage.tsx:108`. Test: render `<StatusBar isStreaming={false}
  leaderActive={false} ... />` and assert the segment is present; with
  `isStreaming={true}`, assert omitted (avoid streaming jitter).
- **Why**: Agent Manager worktrees under `~/.alexi/worktrees/` make cwd
  non-obvious. Alexi's StatusBar already truncates model names to 18
  chars because segment space is tight; idle-only cwd is the right slot.
  Issue #954 was filed 2026-07-12 requesting this exact feature, citing
  the same opencode upstream PR.
- **Source**: sst/opencode `34e5809` "feat(tui): show idle session
  directory" (2026-07-11T20:31:57Z), PR #36457, single-file diff
  `packages/tui/src/component/prompt/index.tsx` +11/-0. Also
  https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/commit/34e58090595d44e3e7cc37498f16753a98627456.
  Alexi issue #954 (2026-07-12).
- **Category**: command. **Size**: small (~30m).

#### 2. Auto-apply auto-implement label + backfill (config, ~20m)

- **What**: Teach Agent 2 (planning, `agent2-planning.yml`) to apply
  the `auto-implement` label when it creates a new enhancement issue.
  The workflow change is ~2 lines: `gh issue create ... | tee
  /tmp/issue_url.txt && gh issue edit $(cat /tmp/issue_url.txt |
  grep -oP '\d+$') --add-label auto-implement`. Then backfill the 27
  open `enhancement` issues missing the label: `gh issue edit 955 954
  952 928 926 924 923 916 911 907 906 905 901 900 899 867 864 862 857 856
  855 853 852 849 848 847 843 842 839 832 --add-label auto-implement`.
  Optionally close #911 and #916 as duplicates of #924 (same lenient
  JSON.parse request filed three times).
- **Why**: `auto-implement.yml` filters on that label; open matches = 0
  today, 27 ready items excluded. This gap has surfaced in four
  consecutive briefs (2026-07-04, -05, -06, -12); the meta-issue #955
  was filed 2026-07-12 proposing automation. The backfill unblocks Agent
  3 immediately; the workflow change prevents the gap from recurring.
- **Source**: `.github/research/2026-07-04-research.md`,
  `2026-07-05-research.md`, `2026-07-06-research.md`,
  `2026-07-12-research.md` (item #3 in each); `gh issue list --state
  open --json labels`; Alexi issue #955 (2026-07-12).
- **Category**: config. **Size**: small (~20m).

#### 3. SIGINT teardown for tracked background processes (ALREADY SHIPPED)

- **What**: Add `process.on('SIGINT')` + `SIGTERM` handlers that
  iterate `runningProcesses`, send `SIGTERM`, wait ~1s, escalate to
  `SIGKILL`. Export `killAllTracked(): Promise<void>` from
  `background-process.ts`. Test: spawn('sleep 30'), register, fire,
  assert `process.kill(pid, 0)` throws `ESRCH` within 2s.
- **Why**: `background-process.ts:85-89` uses `detached: true` +
  `unref()`. Ctrl-C'ing `alexi` mid-session with `npm run dev` running
  could leave the dev server holding the port. Kilocode acknowledged the
  same class of bug with commit `e0bfed3` (2026-07-10T17:15:11Z).
- **Source**: Kilo-Org/kilocode `e0bfed3` "fix: harden Kilo CLI
  shutdown and prevent orphaned processes" (2026-07-10T17:15:11Z),
  https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/commit/e0bfed308ce7906e4d9ca923e82eda1c20cefd2b.
  Alexi implementation: `src/cli/program.ts:13,24-26`,
  `src/cli/interactive.ts:2415-2430`,
  `src/tool/tools/background-process.ts:188-236`.
- **Category**: tool. **Size**: N/A (already complete).
- **Status**: ALREADY SHIPPED. `killAllTracked()` exists and is called
  from both one-shot and interactive shutdown paths. No action required.

## Actionable Recommendations

1. **Order**: #2 first (20 min, unblocks Agent 3 for the week and stops
   the labeling gap from recurring). Then #1 (30 min, user-requested
   polish, popular upstream feature). #3 is already done.
2. **Labeling note**: Issues #954 and #955 both need the
   `auto-implement` label applied as part of the #2 backfill, so they
   become visible to Agent 3 alongside the 25 older issues.
3. **Rotation**: no demotions. Weekly repos (claude-code, aider) resumed
   this cycle; neither produced portable features. Reassess Monday
   2026-07-20.
